title: Kick Away
result_description: You kick and a person launches off into the sky, flying away by scaling down and rising on a keyframed motion path with motion blur.

inputs.name: kick_clip
inputs.what_to_film: Locked-off shot: perform the kick toward the subject.

inputs.name: reaction_clip
inputs.what_to_film: Locked-off shot of the subject's reaction to being kicked; keep arms not spread too wide so background removal cuts cleanly.

capture_requirements.note: arms tucked in for a clean cutout

params.note: slow the kick way down as the base layer
split at the moment the kick lands; delete the right side
drop the reaction cutout onto track 2 at the end of the kick clip
duplicate the cutout to track 3 and match its timing to the layer below
match the kick foot contact to the split point so the cut hits on the kick

params.end: scaled to 0, position up in the sky

edit_steps.note: first keyframe at the transition, second keyframe sends the figure up and shrinks scale to 0

params.note: select the clip near the end and turn the motion blur all the way up

edit_steps.note: shape the first keyframe's speed curve to smooth the launch

result.description: On the kick, the person shrinks and rockets up into the sky with a blurred, eased launch.
success_criteria: Launch is triggered exactly on the kick's foot contact
Clean human cutout with no fringe
Smooth eased acceleration with motion blur
